name: Reasonable Basis Valuation Penalty Waiver

eligibility.description: Available to persons who organized or sold interests in an entity/plan and made a valuation statement exceeding 200% of the correct amount, provided they can prove good faith and a reasonable basis.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: The Secretary has the authority to waive penalties related to gross valuation overstatements if the taxpayer can demonstrate a reasonable basis for the valuation and that it was made in good faith.
